speaker: EDMUND
text: Know of the Duke if his last purpose hold,

speaker: EDMUND
text: Or whether since he is advised by aught

speaker: EDMUND
text: To change the course. He’s full of alteration

speaker: EDMUND
text: And self-reproving. Bring his constant pleasure.

speaker: REGAN
text: Our sister’s man is certainly miscarried.

speaker: EDMUND
text: ’Tis to be doubted, madam.

speaker: REGAN
text: Now, sweet lord,

speaker: REGAN
text: You know the goodness I intend upon you;

speaker: REGAN
text: Tell me but truly, but then speak the truth,

speaker: REGAN
text: Do you not love my sister?

speaker: EDMUND
text: In honored love.

speaker: REGAN
text: But have you never found my brother’s way

speaker: REGAN
text: To the forfended place?

speaker: EDMUND
text: That thought abuses you.

speaker: REGAN
text: I am doubtful that you have been conjunct

speaker: REGAN
text: And bosomed with her as far as we call hers.

speaker: EDMUND
text: No, by mine honor, madam.

speaker: REGAN
text: I never shall endure her. Dear my lord,

speaker: REGAN
text: Be not familiar with her.

speaker: EDMUND
text: Fear me not. She and the Duke, her husband.

speaker: GONERIL
text: I had rather lose the battle than that sister

speaker: GONERIL
text: Should loosen him and me.

speaker: ALBANY
text: Our very loving sister, well bemet.—

speaker: ALBANY
text: Sir, this I heard: the King is come to his daughter,

speaker: ALBANY
text: With others whom the rigor of our state

speaker: ALBANY
text: Forced to cry out. Where I could not be honest,

speaker: ALBANY
text: I never yet was valiant. For this business,

speaker: ALBANY
text: It touches us as France invades our land,

speaker: ALBANY
text: Not bolds the King, with others whom, I fear,

speaker: ALBANY
text: Most just and heavy causes make oppose.

speaker: EDMUND
text: Sir, you speak nobly.

speaker: REGAN
text: Why is this reasoned?

speaker: GONERIL
text: Combine together ’gainst the enemy,

speaker: GONERIL
text: For these domestic and particular broils

speaker: GONERIL
text: Are not the question here.

speaker: ALBANY
text: Let’s then determine

speaker: ALBANY
text: With th’ ancient of war on our proceeding.

speaker: EDMUND
text: I shall attend you presently at your tent.

speaker: REGAN
text: Sister, you’ll go with us?

speaker: GONERIL
text: No.

speaker: REGAN
text: ’Tis most convenient. Pray, go with us.

speaker: GONERIL
text: Oho, I know the riddle.—I will go.

speaker: EDGAR
text: If e’er your Grace had speech with man so poor,

speaker: EDGAR
text: Hear me one word.

speaker: ALBANY
text: I’ll overtake you.—Speak.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Before you fight the battle, ope this letter.

speaker: EDGAR
text: If you have victory, let the trumpet sound

speaker: EDGAR
text: For him that brought it. Wretched though I seem,

speaker: EDGAR
text: I can produce a champion that will prove

speaker: EDGAR
text: What is avouchèd there. If you miscarry,

speaker: EDGAR
text: Your business of the world hath so an end,

speaker: EDGAR
text: And machination ceases. Fortune love you.

speaker: ALBANY
text: Stay till I have read the letter.

speaker: EDGAR
text: I was forbid it.

speaker: EDGAR
text: When time shall serve, let but the herald cry

speaker: EDGAR
text: And I’ll appear again.

speaker: ALBANY
text: Why, fare thee well. I will o’erlook thy paper.

speaker: EDMUND
text: The enemy’s in view. Draw up your powers.

speaker: EDMUND
text: Here is the guess of their true strength and forces

speaker: EDMUND
text: By diligent discovery. But your haste

speaker: EDMUND
text: Is now urged on you.

speaker: ALBANY
text: We will greet the time.

speaker: EDMUND
text: To both these sisters have I sworn my love,

speaker: EDMUND
text: Each jealous of the other as the stung

speaker: EDMUND
text: Are of the adder. Which of them shall I take?

speaker: EDMUND
text: Both? One? Or neither? Neither can be enjoyed

speaker: EDMUND
text: If both remain alive. To take the widow

speaker: EDMUND
text: Exasperates, makes mad her sister Goneril,

speaker: EDMUND
text: And hardly shall I carry out my side,

speaker: EDMUND
text: Her husband being alive. Now, then, we’ll use

speaker: EDMUND
text: His countenance for the battle, which, being done,

speaker: EDMUND
text: Let her who would be rid of him devise

speaker: EDMUND
text: His speedy taking off. As for the mercy

speaker: EDMUND
text: Which he intends to Lear and to Cordelia,

speaker: EDMUND
text: The battle done and they within our power,

speaker: EDMUND
text: Shall never see his pardon, for my state

speaker: EDMUND
text: Stands on me to defend, not to debate.
